channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Need for Civil Religion in America's Political Discourse
item.description: The article argues that America is neither a Christian nation nor a secular one, emphasizing the necessity of a revival of civil religion to foster national unity. The author critiques the divisive fo...

item.title: Black Leaders Advocate for Redistricting Reform in Democratic Party
item.description: The article discusses the growing influence of Black leaders within the Democratic Party who are advocating for significant changes in the redistricting process. These leaders argue that current redis...

item.title: Police Officer Accused of Pushing Lover from 6th Floor Balcony, Leaving Her Paralyzed
item.description: A Kenyan police officer, Agnes Mudigani Ndanu, is at the center of a disturbing domestic violence case after her girlfriend, Nicole Akinyi, was allegedly pushed from a sixth-floor balcony in Kasarani,...

item.title: Kevin James explores maturity and heartbreak in 'Solo Mio'
item.description: The article reviews Kevin James' latest film, Solo Mio, which follows his character Matt Taylor, an art teacher navigating heartbreak after a wedding cancellation. The movie blends romantic comedy tro...

item.title: Surgeons Use Humanoid Robots to Perform First Minimally Invasive Surgeries on Live Pigs
item.description: In a groundbreaking medical experiment, humanoid robots controlled by skilled surgeons successfully removed gallbladders from live pigs during a preclinical trial published in Nature. The teleoperated...

item.title: Tanzania expands rural connectivity with 758 new telecom towers
item.description: Tanzania has been recognized internationally for its telecommunications infrastructure project, which deployed 758 new communication towers to improve connectivity in rural areas. The initiative, laun...

item.title: Internal Conflict at Sullivan & Cromwell Law Firm Over Trump Legal Cases
item.description: The article details the escalating internal conflict within Sullivan & Cromwell law firm representing Donald Trump in legal battles with E.Jean Carroll. Despite initial instructions to avoid involveme...

item.title: Quebec Implements New Licence Requirements for Ontario Truck Drivers to Improve Road Safety
item.description: Quebec has introduced temporary measures requiring Ontario Class 1 truck drivers with less than two years of experience to pass a practical road test before obtaining a Quebec licence. This follows a ...

item.title: World Cup Ticket Prices Drop After USA and Portugal Exit, Ronaldo's Career Ends
item.description: Ticket prices for the FIFA World Cup quarter-final in Los Angeles have dropped significantly after the elimination of the United States and Portugal from the tournament. The exit of both teams, especi...

item.title: Erling Haaland's Connection to England and His Decision to Represent Norway
item.description: Erling Haaland, the Norwegian footballer born in Leeds, Yorkshire, has a complex relationship with England. Despite his birthplace and his father's career in English football, Haaland chose to represe...

item.title: Dataland Gallery Redefines AI Art Through Immersive Biometric Experiences
item.description: The article explores Dataland, an innovative experiential gallery that leverages artificial intelligence and biometric technology to create immersive art installations. Founded by artist Refik Anadol,...

item.title: Australia's productivity crisis hits younger generations
item.description: The article highlights a significant economic slowdown in Australia, with productivity growth collapsing over two decades. Young people born after 1995 are particularly affected, facing a stagnant eco...

item.title: Sindh Government Directs Karachi Private School to Reverse Unlawful Fee Increases
item.description: The Sindh government has ordered a private school in Karachi to immediately reverse unlawful fee increases imposed during the summer holidays. In a directive issued to the principal and administrator ...

item.title: Private jet lands on Asaba road after aborted approach – NSIB
item.description: A private jet operated by VMO Aero Limited landed on a construction road near Asaba Airport instead of the designated runway after an aborted approach. The Nigerian Safety Investigation Bureau (NSIB) ...

item.title: A Viking replica voyage across Europe's waterways
item.description: The article details the journey of an individual who has spent years sailing the world aboard a replica 10th-century Viking longboat. Since volunteering at the Viking Ship Museum of Roskilde in the 19...

item.title: Duterte Family's Use of Romanov Dynasty in Political Discourse
item.description: The article explores how the Romanov dynasty, which ruled Russia for centuries before its collapse in 1917, has been repeatedly invoked by members of the Duterte family in Philippine politics. This hi...

item.title: Honda Recalls Hundreds of Thousands of Vehicles in Canada and U.S.
item.description: Honda Motor Co. has issued a large-scale vehicle recall affecting hundreds of thousands of units in Canada and the United States due to a safety-related defect. The recall, announced on July 9, 2026, ...

item.title: Education Ministry Launches Probe into NCERT's Textbook Paper Supplier Blacklisting
item.description: The Union ministry of education has ordered a probe into the National Council of Educational Research and Training's (NCERT) decision to blacklist a firm responsible for supplying paper for school tex...

item.title: Air Canada Flight Safely Diverts from Runway at Montreal Airport, No Injuries Reported
item.description: An Air Canada flight arriving from Los Angeles veered off the runway at Montréal-Trudeau International Airport on Thursday afternoon, according to the airline. The Boeing 737 Max operated by Flight AC...

item.title: PSL Premier League fixtures reveal Kaizer Chiefs and Orlando Pirates face new teams in opening round
item.description: The Premier Soccer League (PSL) has released the 2026/27 Betway Premiership fixtures, with Kaizer Chiefs and Orlando Pirates set to open their campaigns against newcomers. Mamelodi Sundowns will also ...
